title: artemisia tangutica var. tangutica
intro: Artemisia tangutica var. tangutica is a species of the wormwood plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments. The health benefits of Artemisia tangutica var. tangutica include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
